item.title: Prefiled for introduction.
item.description: Prefiled for introduction.

item.title: First reading, referred to Agriculture & Natural Resources.
item.description: First reading, referred to Agriculture & Natural Resources.
item.guid: 2026-01-12/First reading, referred to Agriculture & Natural Resources.

item.title: Kicking off the 2026 session - Sen. Claudia Kauffman
item.description: News article "Kicking off the 2026 session - Sen. Claudia Kauffman" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: 👍Jarred-Michael Erickson - Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation
item.description: Jarred-Michael Erickson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation.

item.title: 👍Dave Upthegrove - Office of the Commissioner of Public Lands, Department of Natural Resources
item.description: Dave Upthegrove signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of the Commissioner of Public Lands, Department of Natural Resources.

item.title: 👍Glenda Breiler - Office of the Commissioner of Public Lands, Department of Natural Resources
item.description: Glenda Breiler signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of the Commissioner of Public Lands, Department of Natural Resources.

item.title: ❓💵Paul Jewell - Washington State Association of Counties
item.description: Paul Jewell signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of Counties. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓💵Josh Weiss - Clallam Economic Alliance
item.description: Josh Weiss signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Clallam Economic Alliance. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Council Jeremy Takala - Confederated Tribes and Bands of the Yakama Nation
item.description: Council Jeremy Takala signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Confederated Tribes and Bands of the Yakama Nation.

item.title: ANR - Majority; 1st substitute bill be substituted, do pass.

item.title: Minority; do not pass.
item.description: Minority; do not pass.

item.title: Minority; without recommendation.
item.description: Minority; without recommendation.

item.title: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.description: Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.
item.guid: 2026-02-03/Passed to Rules Committee for second reading.

item.title: Washington tribes could get more say in management of state logging lands • Washington State Standard
item.description: News article "Washington tribes could get more say in management of state logging lands • Washington State Standard" from Washington State Standard.

item.title: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.description: Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.
item.guid: 2026-02-10/Placed on second reading by Rules Committee.

item.title: 1st substitute bill substituted.
item.description: 1st substitute bill substituted.

item.title: Floor amendment(s) adopted.
item.description: Floor amendment(s) adopted.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 30; nays, 19; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.description: Third reading, passed; yeas, 30; nays, 19; absent, 0; excused, 0.
item.guid: 2026-02-11/Third reading, passed; yeas, 30; nays, 19; absent, 0; excused, 0.

item.title: 👍💵Michael Moran - 1. Chehalis Tribe. 2. Colville Tribes
item.description: Michael Moran signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent 1. Chehalis Tribe. 2. Colville Tribes. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: ❓💵Paul Jewell - Washington State Association of Counties
item.description: Paul Jewell signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Washington State Association of Counties. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👎Todd Myers - Washington Policy Center
item.description: Todd Myers signed up to testify Con. They are signed up to represent Washington Policy Center.

item.title: Building policy through partnership - Sen. Claudia Kauffman
item.description: News article "Building policy through partnership - Sen. Claudia Kauffman" from Senate Democrats.

item.title: 👎John Worthington - Washington Policy Center
item.description: John Worthington signed up to testify Con.

item.title: 👍Glenda Breiler - Department of Natural Resources
item.description: Glenda Breiler signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Department of Natural Resources.

item.title: 👍Tyson Johnston - Tribal Council, Quinault Indian Nation
item.description: Tyson Johnston signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Tribal Council, Quinault Indian Nation.

item.title: 👍Council Jeremy Takala - Yakama Nation
item.description: Council Jeremy Takala signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Yakama Nation.

item.title: ❓💵Josh Weiss - Skagit County and the Clallam Economic Alliance
item.description: Josh Weiss signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent Skagit County and the Clallam Economic Alliance. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: 👍Jarred-Michel Erickson - Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation
item.description: Jarred-Michel Erickson signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Confederated Tribes of the Colville Reservation.
